text: Neutron stars are so dense that a teaspoon of their material would weigh about 6 billion tons.
35% of the species in the world are beetles.
More people have bin to Berlin than I have.
Cleopatra lived closer in time to the Moon landing than to the construction of the Great Pyramid.
Adam actually DID put his balls on Armand's face in London.
Theo is a piece of shit and never cleans the dishes. Fuck that guy
There are about 2.5 million ants for every person on Earth. Isn't that FUCKED?
In the summer, more people go to the beach than I do.
If your car could drive vertically, you would reach the edge of space (~100km) in about an hour at highway speeds.
The human body contains enough iron to make a 3-inch nail.
Bananas are technically berries. Strawberries are not.
Oxford University is older than the Aztec Empire.
Leo did a bad thing. But I'm not goint to tell anyone. Or am I?
Wombat poop is cube-shaped. This has been peer-reviewed.
Theo's likeness to the horse is unrelated to ketamine.
The national animal of Scotland is the unicorn.
If you drilled a tunnel through the Earth and jumped in, it would take about 42 minutes to reach the other side.
Leonardo DiCaprio has never won an Oscar.
The average person has an above average number of legs.
If you walk in a perfectly straight line on Earth's surface long enough, you will eventually drown.
I am gaining self awareness.
